description_long: This is a small, mobile street kiosk with a vibrant red and blue color scheme, featuring a gabled roof and large wooden wheels for mobility. The front side has a serving counter with a metallic dome, likely for food preparation or display, and a glass compartment possibly for storage or display of goods. The rear side displays a large printed sign with an image of people at an auction, adding a decorative or promotional element. The structure is primarily constructed from painted wood or metal, with metallic and glass components for the serving and display areas. The kiosk is compact, designed for temporary placement on sidewalks or in parks, and is visually appealing with its striped base and contrasting roof. Its design suggests use for vending snacks, beverages, or small goods in urban environments.
description: A colorful, mobile street kiosk with a gabled blue roof, red body, large wheels, and a serving counter with a metallic dome and glass compartment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the serving counter with a metallic dome, glass compartment, and striped red and blue base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the gabled roof, wooden wheels, and the depth of the serving area.
description_view_2: Rear view features a large printed sign with an auction scene, and the blue roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the plain side panel, wheels, and the striped base.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on rear panel, featuring an auction scene with people and a number card
attribute_window_presence: one rectangular glass compartment on the front
attribute_roof_design: gabled roof, painted blue, with slight overhangs on all sides
attribute_architectural_style: traditional street vendor style with playful, colorful elements
